summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ERP Manufacturing & Retail system. Fixed critical POS page bug (missing ShoppingCart import). All backend APIs working (24/24 tests passed). All frontend modules accessible with proper navigation and role-based access.

integration_issues.issue: Products don't appear in POS without inventory stock at outlet locations
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior - products need inventory to be sold

passed_tests: Dashboard stats display (Today Revenue, Transactions, Products, Low Stock, Production, Purchases)
Navigation between all modules (Dashboard, POS, Products, Inventory, Purchasing, Manufacturing, Accounting, Users, Settings)
POS page loading and cart functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: No critical issues found. System is fully functional. Optional: Add sample inventory data for better POS demonstration.
